# CWE-497 negative: diagnostics return generic health only (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-497-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

// RegisterHostDiagnostics exposes only coarse health for external probes.
func RegisterHostDiagnostics() {
	http.HandleFunc("/diag/host", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Header().Set("Cache-Control", "no-store")
		_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "ok"})
	})
}
